title: Prompt Engineering Masterclass
description: For professionals already using AI who want dramatically better results. A full day of deliberate practice on the craft of instructing AI systems — from structured frameworks through reusable team templates to grounding techniques that cut hallucinations on high-stakes work.
objectives: Master a structured prompting framework through repetition on real tasks
Build a reusable prompt template library with your team
Apply grounding techniques for trustworthy outputs
outcomes: Master the Context → Constraint → Format → Example prompt framework
Build reusable prompt templates for your team
Reduce AI hallucinations by 80% with structured prompting techniques

curriculum.summary: Live autopsies of weak prompts — and the framework that fixes them.
Deliberate practice with the structured framework on your real work.
Turn one great prompt into a reusable asset your whole team can run.
Grounding techniques and evaluation habits for high-stakes outputs.
